zh.Bristol St Mary Redcliffe, Gloucestershi: 英國格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托 聖 瑪麗 雷可利福

zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Mede於大約1410年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特維德莫時，他的父親Thomas Mede25歲，母親Margaret19歲。他於大約1442年與Margaret Raynes在英國英格蘭薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1475年12月20日在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托 聖 瑪麗 雷可利福享年66歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托 聖 瑪麗 雷可利福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Mede于大约1410年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特維德莫时，他的父亲Thomas Mede25岁，母亲Margaret19岁。他于大约1442年与Margaret Raynes在英国英格兰薩默塞特结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1475年12月20日在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托 聖 瑪麗 雷可利福享年66岁，埋葬在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托 聖 瑪麗 雷可利福。

nameMeanings.name: Mede
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Bartolo, Croce, Dante, Domenico, Giorgio, Luigi, Pietro, Salvatore, Vincenzo, Vito.  French/Haitian Guerline, Jean Marie.
Italian: from the female personal name Fede, from Latin fides ‘faith’.
Italian: from a short form of the personal name   Federico  .

variants.name: Federico
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Domenic, Antonio, Guerino, Armando, Salvatore, Domenico, Gino, Mario, Nino, Sal, Carmine, Guido, Alfredo, Angelo, Benito, Carmela.  Spanish Jose, Ruben, Carlos, Jesus, Rosario, Enrique, Francisco, Juan.
Italian: from the personal name Federico, of ancient Germanic origin (see Friedrich ). Compare Federick and Frederico .

variants.name: Di Fede
meanings: Italian (Sicily): patronymic or metronymic from the male or female personal name   Fede  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Mede was born about 1410, in Wedmore, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Mede, was 25 and his mother, Margaret, was 19. He married Margaret Raynes about 1442, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died on 20 December 1475, in Bristol St Mary Redcliffe, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66, and was buried in Bristol St Mary Redcliffe, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Mede est né environ 1410, à Wedmore, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Mede, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margaret, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Raynes environ 1442, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé le 20 décembre 1475, à Bristol St Mary Redcliffe, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Bristol St Mary Redcliffe, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Mede um 1410 in Wedmore, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Mede 25 und seine Mutter Margaret 19. ko.Bristol St Mary Redcliffe, Gloucestershi: 영국 그루스스터실르 브리스톨 스트 메리 레드c리프

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Mede(이)가 대략 1410년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 w드모어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Mede(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1442년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 Margaret Raynes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1475년 12월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 브리스톨 스트 메리 레드c리프에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 브리스톨 스트 메리 레드c리프에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Margaret Raynes aproximadamente 1442, em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 20 de dezembro de 1475, em Bristol St Mary Redcliffe, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Bristol St Mary Redcliffe, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Mede родился около 1410 г. в местности ведмор, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Mede было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Raynes около 1442 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер 20 декабря 1475 г. в местности бристол ст мэри редклифф, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности бристол ст мэри редклифф, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.
